name: vibe-pilot
description: Kanban autopilot skills for task classification, triage, implementation, and status reports.

interface.shortDescription: Kanban autopilot skills for AI workspaces.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Pilot provides agent skills for classifying backlog work, triaging complex tasks, implementing selected work, and generating status reports for vibe-kanban projects.
defaultPrompt: Triage this complex task into dependencies.
Generate a status report for tracked projects.
